case_title: BORJA, ROMUEL et al VS FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE COMPANY (SUTTER, BOB)

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY BORJA, ROMUEL BORJA, SOPHIE AS TO DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE COMPANY (SUTTER, BOB) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-06-1997 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
CERT MAIL TO BOB SUTTER PRES. FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE COMP. RETURNED SIGNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BORJA, ROMUEL BORJA, SOPHIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE COMPANY (SUTTER, BOB) $100.00 PRINCIPAL, $21.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $121.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
